The '''Holt family''' was a military family that hailed from [[Anaxes/Legends|Anaxes]] and kept an estate in the [[Sirpar Hills]]. Holts had served in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic]] and [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] continuously for seven centuries and the family was counted among the [[Generationals]]. The [[Holt Cross]] was named for them.

[[Bannidge Holt]] and [[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Fleet Admiral]] [[Holt (Fleet Admiral)|Holt]] were members of the family.<ref name="TEGtW-7">{{Tumblr|subdomain=jasonfry|url=post/23039847571/eg-to-warfare-endnotes-pt-7|name=Jason Fry's Dorkery|text=EG to Warfare: Endnotes Pt. 7}}</ref>
